entry.title: Getting started
entry.summary: Everything you need to start exploring with Maya, Miles, Simone, and Charlie, plus answers to the questions that come up most often. A practical guide to getting the most out of every conversation.

entry.title: Voice your curiosity
entry.summary: Introducing the iOS preview: agents built around the rhythm and timing of natural conversation, powered by a curiosity engine made to help you think out loud. The first step toward more advanced agents and intelligent eyewear.

entry.title: Crossing the uncanny valley of conversational voice
entry.summary: Voice is our most intimate medium as humans. At Sesame, we are creating conversational partners that achieve voice presence—the quality that makes spoken interactions feel real, understood, and valued.
